title: Inaho-kun wa Nise Kanojo no Hazu Nano ni
titleRomaji: Inaho-kun wa Nise Kanojo no Hazu Nano ni
titleNative: 稲穂くんは偽カノジョのはずなのに
synonyms: Inaho-kun Is Supposed to Be a Fake Sweetheart
synopsis: Shintarou Mori, a first-year high school boy, is teased by his friends for wanting to find a beautiful girlfriend and having a sparkling social life. His classmate Inaho Sawatari is regarded as the smartest and most beautiful girl in school. The two of them shouldn't have anything to do with eacher, but when they're inadvertently mistaken for a couple, Inaho proposes: "How about we pretend we're really dating?" They act like a couple in public, but it turns out the most beautiful girl in the school is actually a very cute boy...! (Source: Earth Star Entertainment, translated)

chapterSourceTitle: Inaho-kun wa Nise Kanojo no Hazu na no ni

title: Nyuuyoku Yankees
titleRomaji: Nyuuyoku Yankees
titleNative: 入浴ヤンキース
synopsis: Tatsuya Matsui and Taiga Kuroda are two people who get into fights while exploring various places… but actually they are just looking for public bathhouses in search of the best soak!! (Source: Web Action, Japanese translated)

title: Isekai Maou Gokko: Maou wa Hime wo Taoshitakunai!
titleRomaji: Isekai Maou Gokko: Maou wa Hime wo Taoshitakunai!
titleNative: 異世界魔王ごっこ～魔王は姫を倒したくない！～
synopsis: Nono, an otaku girl who was reincarnated in another world as a demon lord, sees the princess of an enemy country who looks just like her favorite character...? She's the enemy, but she doesn't want to defeat her; in fact, she wants to get closer to her somehow!!! However, it seems that if she gives up being the demon lord, she will die.

tags.name: Yuri
tags.description: Prominently features romance between two females, not inherently sexual. Also known as Girls' Love.

tags.name: Isekai
tags.description: Features a character from a modern-day setting being transported into an alternate world and has to adapt to their new surroundings.

title: Tama Torarechattayoooo
titleRomaji: Tama Torarechattayoooo
titleNative: タマとられちゃったよおおおぉ
synopsis: The grim city of Oosaka is controlled by the Yakuza. On the secluded artificial island of Sakishima, there exists a rumour: There is a "wolf" out hunting the Yakuza. This wolf would use a demon sword to slay the Yakuza's dignity. That is, this sword has the ability to turn them into little girls!!!! A tale of the high-school student who hunts Yakuza and the former-Yakuza girl! These pretend-siblings with a bond too strong will face the Yakuza infesting Oosaka. This is a battle-filled and action-packed story of chivalry featuring big twists and turns!!!
searchTerms: タマとられちゃったよおおおぉ
synonyms: I've Got My Balls Takennnnn~~!
Yakuza Girl

title: Dorei Shoujo to Shinitagari Kyuuketsuki
titleRomaji: Dorei Shoujo to Shinitagari Kyuuketsuki
titleNative: 奴隷少女と死にたがり吸血鬼
synopsis: Falsely accused of poisoning a noble, Sherry heads into the forest to escape her pursuers. There, she meets a vampire who accidentally injures her in his hunger. Feeling guilty, he tells her that he'll do anything to get her forgiveness. Seeing this as a chance to rise out of misfortune, she tells him she wishes to be his bride. She uses various means to get him to fall in love with her, but who will actually be the one to fall first?!

title: Unmei wa Yaku ni Tatanai
titleRomaji: Unmei wa Yaku ni Tatanai
titleNative: 運命は役に立たない
synopsis: One day, red threads appeared on the fingers of all humans worldwide. Since those bound by that thread were destined for lasting relationships, it became known as the "red thread of fate," and a new era dawned where thread-based romance became the norm. While all this was happening, a red thread suddenly appeared on the finger of the protagonist, Tsumugi, who, incidentally, just happens to despise "thread-based love".... (Source: Manga Park, translated)

titleRomaji: Ahab
titleNative: エイハブ
synopsis: The story is set in the 19th century and follows a man who dedicates his life to fighting a giant whale. In those days, people used whale oil instead of petroleum to light their lamps, and the oil extracted from sperm whales was traded at a high price.

title: Isekai kara Elf-san ga Ochite Kita no desu ga!?
titleRomaji: Isekai kara Elf-san ga Ochite Kita no desu ga!?
titleNative: 異世界からエルフさんが落ちてきたのですが!?
synopsis: On his way home, Akio, a nice and caring guy, runs into a beautiful elf girl, Mel, who fell in from another world. Akio is bewildered by Mel, who considers him a lifesaver, and she offers her allegiance to him. But he decides that she can just stay with him for a while...! This sudden encounter will change Akio's life! An exciting love comedy of living together with a beautiful elf is about to begin! (Source: Alphapolis, translated)

title: Miboujin Elf no Kanamori-san
titleRomaji: Miboujin Elf no Kanamori-san
titleNative: 未亡人エルフの金森さん
synonyms: Kanamori-san, The Widowed Elf
synopsis: When a boy consoles Kanamori-san, a beautiful elf whose husband has passed away, by saying "I'll marry you myself," she takes him in as her fiancée...? A sweet and precious pure love comedy between a clumsy delinquent boy and the slightly naive Kanamori-san, with an age gap 500 years apart. (Source: Monthly Action, translated) Note: Originally a one-shot published in Monthly KiSSCA 2020 Oct. issue, with a sequel in December. It was picked up for full serialization in Comic Action starting 2023-02-25.

title: 2200-nen Neko no Kuni Nippon
titleRomaji: 2200-nen Neko no Kuni Nippon
titleNative: 2200年ねこの国ニッポン
synonyms: 2200 Cat Country Japan
synopsis: "2200 Cat Country Japan" is set in the near future, where the human population's birthrate has declined. In this "Cat Country," cats have learned to talk, learn, and work. The story depicts the heartwarming daily life of high school girl Mugishima and her argumentative and wayward pet cat, Sora, who live in this world.

titleRomaji: JoJo no Kimyou na Bouken: The JOJOLands
titleNative: ジョジョの奇妙な冒険 The JOJOLands
synopsis: The stage is set on a volcanic island in the Pacific Ocean, Hawaii. Jodio Joestar, a young boy living on Oahu Island, harbors the ambition to become a great millionaire. The clue to his goal lies in reaching the pinnacle of the mechanisms of this world. What means will he choose to achieve his objective?

titleRomaji: Kurai Ano Ko to Shitai Koto
titleNative: くらいあの子としたいこと
synonyms: 想與陰暗的她一起做的事
synopsis: Starting his second year of high school, Ren Tabata was determined to get over his loner past and make some new friends. The first person he approached was the girl next to him, Touko Sasaki, who seemed gloomy and a little intimidating at first, but he couldn't seem to take his eyes off her. A romantic comedy between two shy but cute people who don't want to be alone anymore! (Source: DoraDora Sharp#, translated)

title: Henkyougurashi no Maou, Tensei shite Saikyou no Majutsushi ni Naru
titleRomaji: Henkyougurashi no Maou, Tensei shite Saikyou no Majutsushi ni Naru
titleNative: 辺境ぐらしの魔王、転生して最強の魔術師になる
synonyms: The Demon King of the Frontier Life, Reincarnated To Become the Strongest Mage ~The Former Demon King Who Grows up While Being Loved, Wants To Know Humans~
synopsis: There was a mage called "The Lone Demon King" at the frontier. He was just a creature that never grew old, but he was loved by the villagers as something of a guardian deity. However, he was destroyed by a magic organization that sees his existence as dangerous. 200 years later, he is reincarnated as the second son of an aristocrat and obtains the strongest magic power. "Let's pretend to be a human this time..." However, being a human lover, he didn't particularly think of revenge and has decided to pretend to be human in this life. In his past life, he was the guardian deity of a region, and in this life, he's a local aristocrat, but he does not know common sense. He doesn't know how to take it easy. As the second son of an aristocrat, he is loved by his family and friends, and while he is regarded as a master of magic in the magic guild, he becomes an "Immortal Mage" behind the scenes. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

titleNative: 転生してハイエルフになりましたが、スローライフは120年で飽きました
synopsis: For most high elves, the stillness of the Great Pulha Woodlands is paradise. For Acer, it's been 120 years of stifling calm. Unlike his kin, Acer remembers another life—one as a human in a different world -–complete with cravings for adventure, hearty meals, a
searchTerms: High Elf with a Long Life

titleRomaji: Garbage Brave: Isekai ni Shoukan Sare Suterareta Yuusha no Fukushuu Monogatari

synonyms: Garbage Hero: A Revenge Story of a Hero Who Got Summoned to Another World
Garbage Brave Revenge story of a hero summoned and discarded in another world
synopsis: While on a regular school day, Tsukuru along with his classmates got transported to another world. However, at the other side of the summoning there was a hero's auction, where each nation would bid for the heroes to defeat the demon kings of each territories. While his classmates received cheat jobs and got auctioned quickly Tsukuru got the useless job "Chef." As no nation bid for him, he got thrown out through a transfer gate. At the other side of the gate was a territory dominated by strong monsters... (Source: Hifumi Shobo, translated)

title: 1000 Yen Hero
titleRomaji: 1000-en Hero
titleNative: 1000円ヒーロ
synonyms: One Thousand Yen Hero
1000 Yen Hero
synopsis: “I won't become a hero even if I am poor, because as long as Honoka continues to smile, it's all worth it.” Monsters are on the loose! But luckily for the people of Japan, heroes are there to protect them, with powers that run on a rate of yen per second. For Hiasa Sen, however, there are many more important things to worry about, like catching sales on groceries, and his many part-time jobs, all to take care of his little sister. When danger approaches, however, he has a secret power of his own, but it may be more trouble than it's worth. (Source: Comikey)

synopsis: Masatora Akutsu has just transferred into class in Japan from a long way away - all the way from Hell, to be exact. Akutsu is a demon who's come to Earth to find someone who can motivate the forces of Hell to fight back against the invading Heavenly army. He i

title: Mimi's Tales of Terror
titleRomaji: Mimi no Kaidan
titleNative: ミミの怪談
synonyms: Mimi's Ghost Stories
Contos de Horror da Mimi
Les cauchemars de Mimi
Las historias de fantasmas de Mimi
synopsis: University student Mimi and her boyfriend Naoto encounter one chilling mystery after another. There’s the enigmatic neighbor woman dressed in black from head to toe—but if she’s so odd, why does it seems like there are many others like her? Then, whose eyes track Mimi’s movements from the cemetery next door? And why does a bizarre red circle drawn on a basement wall change with each passing day? Nine scary stories that really happened, drawn from the famed collection of urban legends Shin Mimibukuro (New Earmuffs), and adapted into manga by horror genius Junji Ito! Chapter 1: On the Utility Pole Chapter 2: The Woman Next Door Chapter 3: Rustling in the Grass Chapter 4: Grave Placement Chapter 5: Seashore Chapter 6: Just the Two of Us Chapter 7: Scarlet Circle Chapter 8: Sign in the Field Chapter 9: Monster Prop (Source: VIZ Media)
